series.title: DMS Plan
series.subtitle: Data management, workflow design, and repository delivery
series.description: A series for operational DMS planning, data workflow design, and the path from project systems to repository-ready delivery.

entries.title: Data Management and Sharing Plan
entries.subtitle: From project systems to repository delivery
entries.summary: An operational workflow presentation showing how DMS planning becomes real work from source systems to structured data and repository delivery.

series.title: Sutton SignWriting Infrastructure Initiative
series.subtitle: Infrastructure, partnership, and sustainability materials
series.description: A series for collaboration, institutional support, international partnership, and long-term SignWriting infrastructure framing.

entries.title: Executive Brief
entries.subtitle: Sutton SignWriting as research infrastructure
entries.summary: A concise forwardable presentation for PI and institutional conversations about Sutton SignWriting as existing infrastructure that needs durable support.

entries.title: Initiative Overview
entries.subtitle: Research Infrastructure and Collaboration Opportunity
entries.summary: A concise overview of Sutton SignWriting as globally used but institutionally fragile research infrastructure.

entries.title: Infrastructure and Stewardship
entries.subtitle: Confirmed assets, continuity, and the case for institutional stabilization
entries.summary: A presentation defining Sutton SignWriting as existing infrastructure with real assets, active stewardship, and identifiable continuity risks.

entries.title: International Shared Support
entries.subtitle: International Shared Support and Partnership Framework
entries.summary: An international support model combining University of Iowa backing, partner relationships, and country ambassadors.

entries.title: Country Ambassadors
entries.subtitle: Country-level outreach, translation, and institutional relationship-building
entries.summary: A volunteer-first country ambassador model for outreach, translation, and institutional relationship-building.

series.title: The Science of Sutton SignWriting
series.subtitle: Language, literacy, brain pathways, and SignWriting as research infrastructure
series.description: A research and publication series on the science of signed language, written sign, literacy, and the infrastructure needed to study them well.

entries.title: Language Without Sound
entries.subtitle: Brain networks, pathway expansion, literacy, and the case for SignWriting infrastructure
entries.summary: Presentation 1 in The Science of Sutton SignWriting series.

entries.title: The Shape of Writing
entries.subtitle: Point, line, plane, and the case for spatial literacy infrastructure
entries.summary: Presentation 2 in The Science of Sutton SignWriting series.

series.title: University of Iowa
series.subtitle: University-facing outreach and collaboration materials
series.description: A series for faculty, grants, development, and institutional-collaboration framing related to Sutton SignWriting.

entries.title: Outreach Memo
entries.subtitle: A concise University of Iowa summary of the full opportunity
entries.summary: A short University of Iowa-facing bridge presentation for internal forwarding, summarizing the immediate lab-home need, Steve's practical value, and the larger infrastructure path.

entries.title: Immediate Lab Home
entries.subtitle: A practical path from 0 percent placement to grants and infrastructure
entries.summary: A PI-facing presentation arguing that a lab home now is the first small decision that makes continuity, salary support, DMS collaborations, grant writing, and future infrastructure possible.

entries.title: Steve Slevinski Value
entries.subtitle: Practical DMS, repository, and research workflow value for the University of Iowa
entries.summary: A University of Iowa-facing presentation focused on Steve Slevinski's immediate operational value through DMS planning, workflow design, code, data shaping, and repository delivery.

entries.title: Sutton SignWriting Infrastructure Initiative
entries.subtitle: A path to shared research infrastructure at the University of Iowa
entries.summary: A University of Iowa-facing presentation about turning Sutton SignWriting from fragile independent stewardship into durable shared research infrastructure.

entries.title: Infrastructure Core and Philanthropy
entries.subtitle: A durable University of Iowa home for global SignWriting infrastructure
entries.summary: A University of Iowa-facing presentation framing the Sutton SignWriting Infrastructure Core as a philanthropic opportunity that complements the lab-home, operational-value, and grant-development structure.

entries.title: Relevant Precedents and Institutional Pathways
entries.subtitle: What comparable university models suggest for SignWriting at Iowa
entries.summary: A University of Iowa-facing presentation using language, archive, sign-language, and data-infrastructure precedents to show that SignWriting follows a recognizable institutional path rather than requiring a speculative leap.
